raw_consumer_statement:
I sent this email to XXXX I am writing to formally dispute a charge of {$1000.00} posted to my account on XX/XX/year>, by XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX. Below, I provide the details of the transaction and the unresolved issue : Transaction Date : XX/XX/year> Merchant : XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX Product : Engine purchased for {$1000.00} Issue : The engine was found to be defective and returned, but the merchant refused to issue a full refund. 



Background : 1. On XX/XX/year>, I purchased an engine from XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX for {$1000.00}. 

2. Shortly after the purchase, my trusted mechanic determined that the engine had a broken part, rendering it defective. 

3. On XX/XX/year> I tried to return item but it was closed so I had to wait till Monday 3. On XX/XX/year>, I returned the engine to the merchant and requested a full refund. 

4. The merchant refused. 



In an effort to resolve this issue amicably, I filed a complaint with the XXXX XXXX XXXX ( XXXX  ) on XX/XX/year>. Unfortunately, the merchant did not respond or offer any resolution. 



Reasons for Dispute : 1. Failure to Disclose Restocking Fee : The restocking fee was not disclosed at the time of purchase. As a consumer, I had no prior knowledge of this policy until after I returned the product.

2. Sale of a Defective Product : The engine was sold as functional but was found to have a critical defect. Under consumer protection laws, products must be fit for their intended purpose unless explicitly sold as-is or with disclosed d
efects.

3. Prompt Return in Good Faith : I returned the defective product promptly, in its original condition, within two days of purchase. I no longer have this item I returned it.

4. Merchants Lack of Cooperation : Despite my good faith efforts, including the BBB complaint, the merchant has not responded in resolving the issue.

Request for Resolution : Based on these circumstances, I respectfully request a full reversal of the {$1000.00} charge. I have attached documentation to support my dispute, including : A picture from my mechanic regarding the defect Correspondence with the merchant and the XXXX  Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter. I look forward to your response. 



Sincerely, XXXX XXXX They denied my dispute and claimed it was merchant fault. This has been ongoing since XX/XX/year> and theres no way im paying {$1000.00} for an item not in my possession and while being a single mom barely making it by.
